0.1.3.Note: [Beta release] may be unstable and has bugs
0.1.3.Description: v0.1.3 release bug fix and performance improvements
Features: Fixed blank canvas bug by restoring graph data injection placeholder
Eliminated numerical instability and NaN-related rendering crashes
Stabilized graph physics to prevent node jitter and erratic movement
Refactored frontend to use standard ForceGraph API for better compatibility
Optimized rendering lifecycle for smoother initial visualization load
